#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
ćäžșææș ADB ææć©æ
èȘćšæŁæ”èźŸć€ăæç€șæææ­„éȘ€ăéȘèŻèżæ„
"""

import subprocess
import time
import sys
import os

def run_command(cmd):
    """æ§èĄćœä»€ćč¶èżćèŸćș"""
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(
            cmd,
            shell=True,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            encoding='utf-8',
            timeout=5
        )
        return result.stdout.strip(), result.stderr.strip(), result.returncode
    except Exception as e:
        return "", str(e), 1

def check_adb_installed():
    """æŁæ„ ADB æŻćŠć·ČćźèŁ"""
    print("đ æŁæ„ ADB ćźèŁç¶æ...")
    stdout, stderr, code = run_command("adb version")
    if code == 0:
        print("â ADB ć·ČćźèŁ")
        print(f"   {stdout.split()[1]}")
        return True
    else:
        print("â ADB æȘćźèŁ")
        print("\nèŻ·ćźèŁ ADB:")
        print("   Windows: äžèœœ Android Platform Tools")
        print("   https://developer.android.com/tools/releases/platform-tools")
        return False

def list_devices():
    """ććșèżæ„çèźŸć€"""
    stdout, stderr, code = run_command("adb devices")
    return stdout

def check_authorization():
    """æŁæ„èźŸć€ææç¶æ"""
    print("\nđ æŁæ„èźŸć€èżæ„ç¶æ...")
    output = list_devices()

    lines = output.split('\n')[1:]  # è·łèżçŹŹäžèĄæ éą

    devices = []
    unauthorized = []

    for line in lines:
        if '\t' in line:
            device_id, status = line.split('\t')
            if status == 'device':
                devices.append(device_id)
            elif status in ['unauthorized', 'no permissions']:
                unauthorized.append(device_id)

    return devices, unauthorized

def show_phone_instructions():
    """æŸç€șææșç«ŻæäœæćŒ"""
    print("\n" + "="*50)
    print("đ± èŻ·ćšćäžșææșäžæäœïŒ")
    print("="*50)
    print("\n1ïžâŁ  æćŒăèźŸçœźă")
    print("2ïžâŁ  èżć„ăçł»ç»ćæŽæ°ă")
    print("3ïžâŁ  çčć»ăćŒćäșșćééĄčă")
    print("     (ćŠæČĄæïŒèŻ·ććŒćŻïŒ")
    print("     èźŸçœź â ćłäșææș â èżç»­çčć»ăçæŹć·ă7æŹĄ)")
    print("\n4ïžâŁ  ćŒćŻăUSBè°èŻăćŒćł")
    print("\n5ïžâŁ  ææșäŒćŒčćșăćèźžUSBè°èŻăæç€ș")
    print("     â ćŸéăć§ç»ćèźžäœżçšèżć°èźĄçźæșè°èŻă")
    print("     â çčć»ăćèźžă")
    print("\n" + "="*50)
    print("\nâł ćźæćæćèœŠéźç»§ç»­...")
    input()

def wait_for_authorization(max_wait=60):
    """ç­ćŸçšæ·ææ"""
    print("\nâł ç­ćŸèźŸć€ææ...")

    for i in range(max_wait):
        devices, unauthorized = check_authorization()

        if devices:
            print(f"\nâ æææćïŒæŁæ”ć° {len(devices)} ć°èźŸć€")
            for dev in devices:
                print(f"   đ± {dev}")
            return True

        if unauthorized:
            print(f"â ïž  æŁæ”ć°èźŸć€äœæȘææ: {unauthorized}")
            print("   èŻ·ćšææșäžçčć»ăćèźžă")

        time.sleep(1)
        if i % 5 == 0:
            print(f"   ç­ćŸäž­... ({i}/{max_wait}ç§)")

    print("\nâ ç­ćŸè¶æ¶")
    return False

def get_device_info():
    """è·ćèźŸć€äżĄæŻ"""
    print("\nđ è·ćèźŸć€äżĄæŻ...")

    commands = {
        "ćć·": "adb shell getprop ro.product.model",
        "ć¶é ć": "adb shell getprop ro.product.manufacturer",
        "AndroidçæŹ": "adb shell getprop ro.build.version.release",
        "SDKçæŹ": "adb shell getprop ro.build.version.sdk",
    }

    for name, cmd in commands.items():
        stdout, _, _ = run_command(cmd)
        if stdout:
            print(f"   {name}: {stdout}")

def main():
    print("="*50)
    print("đ§ ćäžșææș ADB ææć©æ")
    print("="*50)

    # æŁæ„ ADB
    if not check_adb_installed():
        return

    # éćŻ ADB æćĄ
    print("\nđ éćŻ ADB æćĄ...")
    run_command("adb kill-server")
    time.sleep(1)
    run_command("adb start-server")
    time.sleep(2)

    # æŁæ„ćć§ç¶æ
    devices, unauthorized = check_authorization()

    if devices:
        print("\nâ èźŸć€ć·ČææïŒ")
        get_device_info()
        return

    # æŸç€șæćŒćč¶ç­ćŸææ
    show_phone_instructions()

    if wait_for_authorization():
        get_device_info()
        print("\nđ ADB ææćźæïŒç°ćšćŻä»„äœżçšä»„äžćèœïŒ")
        print("   âą æć±: scrcpy")
        print("   âą æȘćŸ: adb shell screencap -p /sdcard/screen.png")
        print("   âą ćœć±: adb shell screenrecord /sdcard/video.mp4")
    else:
        print("\nđĄ æç€șïŒ")
        print("   1. çĄźäż USB çșżèżæ„æ­Łćžž")
        print("   2. æŁæ„ææș USB è°èŻæŻćŠćŒćŻ")
        print("   3. ć°èŻéæ°ææ USB çșż")
        print("   4. èżèĄ: adb devices æ„çç¶æ")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        main()
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\n\nđ çšæ·ćæ¶æäœ")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\nâ ćçéèŻŻ: {e}")
